## AI Declaration

If your pull request was AI-assisted or contains AI-generated content, please complete the following declaration:

**AI Usage Level:** (Select one: none, hint, assist, pair, copilot, auto)

If your PR includes AI-generated content, please also complete the `AI-DECLARATION.md` file in this repository and ensure your submission meets our transparency standards.

For more information, see [AI-DECLARATION.md](https://github.com/autokey/autokey/blob/master/AI-DECLARATION.md).

---

## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and any relevant context for reviewers.

### Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Enhancement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (please describe)

### Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published
